title: Special Episode: A Full Breakdown of the OpenAI Saga and What It Means for AI Founders
title_zh: 特辑： OpenAI传奇的全面细分及其对人工智能创始人的意义
full_text: In light of one of the biggest news stories in AI, we’ve put together a special episode to discuss the ramifications of Sam Altmans’ firing from OpenAI. Regardless of what happens between now and when you’re listening to this, the implications of the events that happened over the past few days are certainly worth unpacking. About our guests: Alex Konrad, a journalist at Forbes covering Venture Capital and Tech Jason Warner, former CTO at GitHub, partner at Redpoint, and now Founder of AGI start-
